name: Supermetrics Marketing Data Pipeline API
what_it_does: Supermetrics marketing data pipeline REST API and connectors for marketing teams and analysts to extract, transform, and load marketing performance data from 150+ ad platforms, social networks, and analytics tools into data warehouses, BI tools, and spreadsheets for centralized marketing analytics automation. Enables AI agents to manage data source connection for marketing data extraction automation, handle Google Ads, Facebook Ads, and LinkedIn Ads data pull for paid media analytics automation, access organic social media metrics from Instagram, TikTok, and Twitter for content performance automation, retrieve SEO data from Google Search Console and SEMrush for organic search automation, manage data destination push to BigQuery, Snowflake, Redshift, and S3 for data warehouse automation, handle scheduled data refresh and pipeline orchestration for marketing reporting automation, access campaign performance aggregation across channels for cross-channel attribution automation, retrieve custom metric and dimension configuration for tailored analytics automation, manage data transformation and blending for cross-platform analytics automation, and integrate Supermetrics with Looker Studio, Power BI, Tableau, and reporting platforms for end-to-end marketing analytics workflow.
use_cases: Pulling cross-channel paid media data from marketing analytics pipeline agents
Automating marketing data warehouse loads from BigQuery ETL agents
Centralizing campaign performance from multi-platform attribution agents
Scheduling daily marketing data refreshes from reporting automation agents
not_for: Real-time marketing data (Supermetrics refreshes are scheduled, not real-time)
CRM or sales data pipelines (use Fivetran or Stitch for CRM ETL)
Raw ad platform API access (use Google Ads API or Meta Ads API directly for custom integrations)
best_when: A marketing analytics team or agency wanting AI agents to automate marketing data extraction from 150+ ad platforms into centralized data warehouses or BI tools through Supermetrics' pre-built connectors without managing individual ad platform APIs.
avoid_when: API-BASED vs CONNECTOR-BASED ACCESS: Supermetrics primary integration model is through pre-built connectors for Looker Studio, Google Sheets, BigQuery, etc.; direct REST API access is limited and requires custom integration plan; automated workflow expecting standard REST API for all sources may find connector-based access more appropriate. DATA FRESHNESS AND REFRESH LIMITS: Supermetrics data freshness depends on scheduled refresh frequency; real-time marketing data requires ad platform direct APIs; automated dashboard expecting sub-hourly data refresh may exceed Supermetrics plan refresh limits. ATTRIBUTION DATA OWNERSHIP: Supermetrics extracts data from ad platforms as-is; cross-channel attribution logic must be implemented downstream; automated attribution calculation requiring Supermetrics to apply multi-touch models is outside Supermetrics scope. CONNECTOR PLAN LIMITS: Different Supermetrics plans limit the number of data sources, accounts, and destinations; automated expansion of data sources must account for plan limits; automated connection of additional ad accounts may require plan upgrade.

auth.notes: Supermetrics uses API key and OAuth 2.0 for source connections. REST API with JSON. Helsinki, Finland HQ. Founded 2013 by Mikael Thuneberg. Bootstrapped (no external VC). Products: 150+ connectors, data destinations (BigQuery, Snowflake, Redshift), Looker Studio, Google Sheets, Excel. No webhooks (scheduled refresh only). GDPR. SOC2. Serves 17,000+ companies. Competes with Funnel.io, Windsor.ai, and Fivetran for marketing data pipelines.

pricing.free_tier_limits: 14-day free trial; no permanent free tier
pricing.paid_tiers: Essential ($69/mo), Core ($199/mo), Business ($499/mo), Enterprise (custom); per destination pricing
pricing.notes: Helsinki FI. Bootstrapped. Per-destination subscription. Annual discount available.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per plan; query and refresh APIs throttled; no real-time webhooks (scheduled only)

known_agent_gotchas: NO REAL-TIME WEBHOOKS FOR DATA COMPLETION: Supermetrics does not provide webhooks for data refresh completion; automated downstream processing must implement polling or scheduled delay after refresh trigger; automated immediate query after refresh trigger may return stale data if refresh is still in progress

AD PLATFORM OAUTH TOKEN REFRESH DEPENDENCY: Supermetrics data pulls require active OAuth connection to each ad platform (Google, Meta, LinkedIn); automated data pipeline depends on OAuth token validity; automated pipeline fails silently when ad platform OAuth token expires requiring manual reauthorization in Supermetrics UI

QUERY RESULT PAGINATION FOR LARGE DATASETS: Supermetrics API returns paginated results for large dataset queries; automated data extraction must handle multi-page results; automated single-page extraction on large ad account creates incomplete dataset without error indication

DATE RANGE AND ATTRIBUTION WINDOW ALIGNMENT: Supermetrics date range queries must account for ad platform attribution windows (typically 7-28 days for conversions); automated reporting with fixed date range misses attribution-window conversions; automated data backfill must include attribution window overlap

CONNECTOR BREAKING CHANGES FROM AD PLATFORMS: Supermetrics connectors can break when underlying ad platform APIs change their data schema; automated pipelines using deprecated fields create empty columns; automated pipeline monitoring should validate field availability after ad platform API updates
agent_readiness.security_notes: Marketing data. GDPR, SOC2. API key/OAuth. EU/US. Ad platform credentials and campaign performance data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Marketing analytics. GDPR, SOC2. API key/OAuth. EU. Ad platform data.
